name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mutants in Manhattan

install_dir_names: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Mutants in Manhattan

post_apply_message:
Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mutants in Manhattan (2016, PlatinumGames, delisted 2017) — Apply adds the Steam shortcut on GE-Proton 10.34 under the full proper name.

WHY A RECIPE FOR A 'SIMPLE' GAME: it deployed fine as a plain game, but the generic shortcut took the folder name ('TMNT - Mutants in Manhattan'). This recipe just pins the correct display name and the right exe (TMNT_MiM.exe) so it reads properly in Steam and survives a reimage. No fix beyond that — it's a native, controller-first console-style game.

CONTROLLER: built for a gamepad — Steam Input's default layout works.
notes: Built 2026-07-21 so the Steam entry reads 'Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mutants in Manhattan' instead of the folder name. Delisted from Steam in 2017 (licensing) — abandonware lane. Launch exe TMNT_MiM.exe (marker + shortcut). UE-based, native XInput. No widescreen/perf work known-needed. NOTE: earlier this folder FALSE-MATCHED true-crime-nyc via its generic d3d9.ini marker (fixed in db21a32) and got a bogus 'True Crime: New York City' shortcut; with a real recipe + name-match it now identifies correctly. Non-Steam -> computed appid. UNTESTED beyond 'deploys + names right'.
